title: Rain Alley Storyboards
description: A reference-dependent series of cinematic 16:9 storyboard sheets following the same rain-alley protagonist, prop, and pencil production-board language.
creative_direction: Continuity storyboard series: image 01 establishes the protagonist, rainy alley location, camera-arrow notation style, and six-panel board format; images 02-04 extend the same film sequence.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Rain Alley Storyboards
en.description: A reference-dependent series of cinematic 16:9 storyboard sheets following the same rain-alley protagonist, prop, and pencil production-board language.

zh-CN.title: 雨巷分镜系列
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的 16:9 电影分镜板,延续同一雨巷主角、道具和铅笔制作板语言。
